title: Veterinary Medicines Directorate Annual Report and Accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "This report includes a financial review and statements for the Veterinary Medicines Directorate for the financial year 2024 to 2025.  This paper was laid before Parliament in response to a legislative requirement.  Also included is an overview of the agency’s performance and achievements as an executive agency of the Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs.  "
